text: Stepping from a dim, almost abandoned hallway into this brightly colored, information-rich space, I feel a striking contrast. The emptiness outside leaves me slightly uneasy, as if I am trespassing somewhere I'm not supposed to be. Inside, the vibrant wall and glowing screens draw my curiosity and attention, promising knowledge and innovation. Yet the absence of people makes it all feel a little surreal—a laboratory of ideas awaiting the spark of human presence. I feel both anticipation and a hint of loneliness here, pondering the relationship between humans and machines that this exhibit seems to explore.
